title: Fix Unexpected Waveform when using always_comb and always_ff

features.name: cross_domain_feedback_signal_combinational_to_sequential
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned in always_comb (blocking) that is read in always_ff (non-blocking), creating feedback between combinational and sequential timing domains

features.name: conditional_latch_pattern_in_always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a signal is assigned a default value that is conditionally overridden, creating a latch-like behavior

features.name: combinational_output_from_cross_domain_signal
features.description: Code should include a combinational output assign that directly reads a signal which is also used in a sequential block, where the signal's update semantics differ between simulation tools
features.snippet: assign out_data_prev = data_n;  // out_data_prev reflects immediate always_comb updates
